name: J1587 CAPL Functions
title: J1587 CAPL Functions
description: Appends a J1587 parameter to a J1708 message.
Gets a J1587 parameter inside a J1708 message given a specific PID.
Gets the count of J1587 parameters inside a given J1708 message.
Selects the setting for the transport protocol.
tables: Appends a J1587 parameter to a J1708 message.
Gets a J1587 parameter inside a J1708 message at a given index.
Gets a J1587 parameter inside a J1708 message given a specific PID.
Gets the count of J1587 parameters inside a given J1708 message.
Selects the setting for the transport protocol.
